description: Composition White cotton salwar, with a drawstring at the waist and tapered legs Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using mild detergent Dry in shade Do not soak These salwars created with soft, plush fabric, are perfect to wear with your long kurtas. For those inclined to experiment in ethnic boho chic, style this with a long basic top, a waistcoat with heavy ethnic detailing, and ethnic sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26”
